title: My First UK Workshops!
excerpt: I’m so excited to announce that I’ll be teaching a weekend of paper crafting fun for Birds of a Feather this October ! Though I have been limiting my international travel for work lately, this is a trip that I…
body: I’m so excited to announce that I’ll be teaching a weekend of paper crafting fun for Birds of a Feather this October! Though I have been limiting my international travel for work lately, this is a trip that I have been wanting to make for quite some time. This will be my first workshops ever in the UK and we’ll be using supplies from my new American Crafts collection, Hustle & Heart, along with some of my favorite brands. We will even throw in some fun surprises and exclusives for you. My classes will take place on October 21st and 22nd at Chateau Impney in Worcestershire!
